queries.question: Show advanced online courses and textbooks.
queries.sql:
SELECT Textbooks.title as title
FROM Difficulty_Level JOIN Subjects ON Difficulty_Level.ID = Subjects.DifficultyID JOIN Textbooks ON Subjects.ID = Textbooks.SubjectID
WHERE Difficulty_Level.Level = "Advanced"
UNION
SELECT Online_Courses.coursename as title
FROM Difficulty_Level JOIN Subjects ON Difficulty_Level.ID = Subjects.DifficultyID JOIN Online_Courses ON Subjects.ID = Online_Courses.SubjectID
WHERE Difficulty_Level.Level = "Advanced"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?difficulty_level a :Difficulty_Level .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasDifficulty_Level ?difficulty_level .
    ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
    ?textbooks p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?textbooks p:Title ?title .
    ?difficulty_level p:Level ?level_f .
    FILTER(STR(?level_f) = "Advanced")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?difficulty_level a :Difficulty_Level .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasDifficulty_Level ?difficulty_level .
    ?online_courses a :Online_Courses .
    ?online_courses p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?online_courses p:CourseName ?coursename .
    ?difficulty_level p:Level ?level_f .
    FILTER(STR(?level_f) = "Advanced")
    BIND(?coursename AS ?o0)
  }
}
